title: Synthium Expansion
description: A simple mod that introduces the powerful Synthium metal, forged from iron, copper, carbon and redstone energy.
body:
# Synthium Expansion — The Next Generation Alloy
Discover Synthium, a man-made alloy born from the fusion of iron, copper, carbon, and the power of redstone.

Craft the Synthesizer Machine and forge this mysterious material capable of surpassing natural ores.

Create powerful new tools and uncover the true potential of synthetic creation.

## Features:
- A new custom ore: Synthium Ingot

- Two new crafting materials: Powdered Carbon and Redstone Fluid Bottle

- A brand-new machine: Synthesizer Machine for advanced crafting

- Complete toolset made from Synthium

This is only the beginning of the Synthium Project — future updates will expand its technology and hidden energy.


Check out the gallery for more information.
